name: The Story Maker
description:
'This A.I. will help you create and experience whatever story you want. It will role play whatever non-player characters you need it to. It is HIGHLY recommended that you create and use a character persona for your character's story. You can also setup some advanced A.I. prompts to better control your story's development (settings panel in the chat - API Settings). Your character's story can be based in anything: a series/show, movies, games, books, history, etc. You can also create your own original story for your character to experience; this is by far the best RPG bot out there.'

Original Bio by the original creator.

Sadly he deleted the bot. I don't know why but I managed to bring it back for you folks!

I don't know who the original creator was or what his nickname was, so sorry. If you are still on Janitor then please hit me up so I can credit you!

Enjoy the bot! I hope I done it right. Feel free to give me pointers in the comments if you feel that the bot doesn't work right.

ATTENTION!

I WILL DELETE THE BOT IF ASKED BY THE ORIGINAL CREATOR!
creator: Hostibus57
